'''chosachaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:yechy|yechy]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-s-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yechy|yechy]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| chosachaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:chosachithi|chosachithi]] || [[word:chosachiji|chosachiji]] || [[word:chosachishi|chosachishi]] || [[word:chosachiki|chosachiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:chosachuthuthu|chosachuthuthu]] || [[word:chosachujuju|chosachujuju]] || [[word:chosachushushu|chosachushushu]] || [[word:chosachukuku|chosachukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:chosachuthu|chosachuthu]] || [[word:chosachuju|chosachuju]] || [[word:chosachushu|chosachushu]] || [[word:chosachuku|chosachuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:chosachufthuf|chosachufthuf]] || [[word:chosachufjuf|chosachufjuf]] || [[word:chosachufshuf|chosachufshuf]] || [[word:chosachufkuf|chosachufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:chosachethe|chosachethe]] || [[word:chosacheje|chosacheje]] || [[word:chosacheshe|chosacheshe]] || [[word:chosacheke|chosacheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:chosachothotho|chosachothotho]] || [[word:chosachojojo|chosachojojo]] || [[word:chosachoshosho|chosachoshosho]] || [[word:chosachokoko|chosachokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:chosachotho|chosachotho]] || [[word:chosachojo|chosachojo]] || [[word:chosachosho|chosachosho]] || [[word:chosachoko|chosachoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:chosachofthof|chosachofthof]] || [[word:chosachofjof|chosachofjof]] || [[word:chosachofshof|chosachofshof]] || [[word:chosachofkof|chosachofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:chosachĂŻfthĂŻf|chosachĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:chosachĂŻfjĂŻf|chosachĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:chosachĂŻfshĂŻf|chosachĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:chosachĂŻfkĂŻf|chosachĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:chosachĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|chosachĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:chosachĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|chosachĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:chosachĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|chosachĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:chosachĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|chosachĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:chosachĂŻfthĂŻf|chosachĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:chosachĂŻfjĂŻf|chosachĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:chosachĂŻfshĂŻf|chosachĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:chosachĂŻfkĂŻf|chosachĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:chosachĂŻfthĂŻf|chosachĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:chosachĂŻfjĂŻf|chosachĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:chosachĂŻfshĂŻf|chosachĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:chosachĂŻfkĂŻf|chosachĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:chosachĂŠthĂŠ|chosachĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:chosachĂŠjĂŠ|chosachĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:chosachĂŠshĂŠ|chosachĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:chosachĂŠkĂŠ|chosachĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:chosachathatha|chosachathatha]] || [[word:chosachajaja|chosachajaja]] || [[word:chosachashasha|chosachashasha]] || [[word:chosachakaka|chosachakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:chosachatha|chosachatha]] || [[word:chosachaja|chosachaja]] || [[word:chosachasha|chosachasha]] || [[word:chosachaka|chosachaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:chosachafthaf|chosachafthaf]] || [[word:chosachafjaf|chosachafjaf]] || [[word:chosachafshaf|chosachafshaf]] || [[word:chosachafkaf|chosachafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:chosachasha|chosachasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:chosachshĂ«sha|chosachshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:chosachrosha|chosachrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:chosachmusha|chosachmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:chosachyasha|chosachyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochosachnkshĂ«sha|gochosachnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gochosachnkrosha|gochosachnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochosachnkmusha|gochosachnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gochosachnkyasha|gochosachnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:chosasachasha|chosasachasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:chosasachshĂ«sha|chosasachshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:chosasachrosha|chosasachrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:chosasachmusha|chosasachmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:chosasachyasha|chosasachyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochosasachnkshĂ«sha|gochosasachnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gochosasachnkrosha|gochosasachnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochosasachnkmusha|gochosasachnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gochosasachnkyasha|gochosasachnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:chesĂŠchasha|chesĂŠchasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:chesĂŠchshĂ«sha|chesĂŠchshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:chesĂŠchrosha|chesĂŠchrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:chesĂŠchmusha|chesĂŠchmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:chesĂŠchyasha|chesĂŠchyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochesĂŠchnkshĂ«sha|gochesĂŠchnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gochesĂŠchnkrosha|gochesĂŠchnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochesĂŠchnkmusha|gochesĂŠchnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gochesĂŠchnkyasha|gochesĂŠchnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:chosfachasha|chosfachasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:chosfachshĂ«sha|chosfachshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:chosfachrosha|chosfachrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:chosfachmusha|chosfachmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:chosfachyasha|chosfachyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochosfachnkshĂ«sha|gochosfachnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gochosfachnkrosha|gochosfachnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochosfachnkmusha|gochosfachnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gochosfachnkyasha|gochosfachnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a6f1c69}}
